parameters: Oh, \n[1]. It's gotten pretty late, you know.
The moment I got through the door, I ran into my old man.
...Don't cause too much trouble for Shino-kun and Rino-kun.
--"I'm home", was all that I spat out to him, before I returned straight to my room.
スライドスピード = def
I don't "hate" him or "detest" him, not really.
Maybe I did in the past but, as I've grown older... I've come to realize that
what happened in the past was probably not what he himself wanted either.
But still, it's undeniable that because of that,
a [deep rift] formed between our relationship.
Making excuses about how "it'll heal with time",
I breathed out a light sigh.
I took a shower, a bath and brushed my teeth.
Not including the fact that I had to go to school on a Sunday for that
announcement today, a whole lot still happened.
Guess I'll go to sleep early....
This late?... I wonder who it's from.
I could feel the tension I've been under all day simply melting away
after reading the messages from my good friend.
While thanking him in my heart, I decided to look at the account he mentioned.
# Take out your phone and select [Secret Social Media].
# The content there is updated several times throughout the story,
so please regularly check it as you progress.
Having finished adding the channel to my secret list,
I decided to finally turn in for the night.
# Clicking the smartphone or the time icon, and selecting either one turn (Late Night ->
Morning) or one whole day will allow you to sleep and wake up the following morning.
Please use it to skip time when you're out of things to do.
This is my old man's room.

Morning) or one whole day will allow you to sleep and wake up the following morning.
(Smartphone can be activated with either [Q] or [L1].)
Please use it to skip time when you're out of things to do.
